scenario: Verify service operation succeeds with all valid inputs
expected_result: Service completes successfully and returns correct response

scenario: Verify service result is correctly persisted and retrievable
expected_result: Data from service operation is stored and can be fetched accurately

scenario: Verify service fails when required fields are missing
expected_result: System returns validation error for missing fields during service

scenario: Verify service rejects invalid data format
expected_result: System returns format error and does not process invalid service request

scenario: Verify service returns appropriate error for unauthorized request
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthorized service attempt

scenario: Verify: External service returns 500 error
expected_result: System handles gracefully: External service returns 500 error

scenario: Verify: External service times out
expected_result: System handles gracefully: External service times out

scenario: Verify: External service returns malformed response
expected_result: System handles gracefully: External service returns malformed response

scenario: Verify: Database connection pool exhausted
expected_result: System handles gracefully: Database connection pool exhausted

scenario: Verify: Network partition between services
expected_result: System handles gracefully: Network partition between services

scenario: Verify service with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace or rejects empty input during service

scenario: Verify service with Unicode / non-ASCII characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode without corruption during service

scenario: Verify service with extremely long input (10,000+ chars)
expected_result: System rejects or truncates safely during service

scenario: Verify service with HTML/script tags in text fields
expected_result: System sanitises and prevents rendering during service

scenario: Verify service with leading and trailing spaces
expected_result: System trims and processes correctly during service

scenario: Verify service with null bytes in string input
expected_result: System rejects or sanitises null bytes during service

scenario: Verify service with emoji characters in text fields
expected_result: System handles emoji without crash or corruption during service

scenario: Verify service with minimum allowed input length (1 char)
expected_result: System accepts minimum boundary for service

scenario: Verify service with maximum allowed input length
expected_result: System accepts maximum boundary for service

scenario: Verify service with input exceeding maximum length by 1
expected_result: System rejects over-maximum boundary for service

scenario: Verify service with zero-length / empty input
expected_result: System rejects empty input for service with clear error

scenario: Verify service is protected against SQL injection via ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises SQL injection and returns error on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against XSS via <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System escapes HTML/JS and prevents XSS execution on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against command injection via ; rm -rf /
expected_result: System sanitises shell commands and rejects on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against path traversal via ../../etc/passwd
expected_result: System blocks path traversal attempts on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against CSRF attack without valid token
expected_result: System rejects request missing CSRF protection on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against authentication bypass with forged JWT
expected_result: System rejects invalid/forged authentication tokens on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against privilege escalation to admin role
expected_result: System denies escalation and logs the attempt on service

scenario: Verify service is protected against brute-force with 100+ rapid requests
expected_result: System rate-limits and blocks after threshold on service

scenario: Verify service requires valid authentication
expected_result: System returns 401 for unauthenticated service request

scenario: Verify service access as admin
expected_result: System enforces correct permissions for admin attempting service

scenario: Verify service access as authenticated user
expected_result: System enforces correct permissions for authenticated user attempting service

scenario: Verify service access as guest/anonymous user
expected_result: System enforces correct permissions for guest/anonymous user attempting service

scenario: Verify service access as read-only user
expected_result: System enforces correct permissions for read-only user attempting service

scenario: Verify service access as manager
expected_result: System enforces correct permissions for manager attempting service

scenario: Verify user cannot access admin-only resources
expected_result: System returns 403 Forbidden for non-admin users

scenario: Verify user cannot modify another user's data
expected_result: System prevents cross-user data modification with appropriate error

scenario: Verify transition from 'draft' to 'published' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from draft to published and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'published' back to 'draft' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'pending' to 'approved' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from pending to approved and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'approved' back to 'pending' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'pending' to 'rejected' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from pending to rejected and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'rejected' back to 'pending' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'active' to 'inactive' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from active to inactive and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'inactive' back to 'active' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'active' to 'suspended' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from active to suspended and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'suspended' back to 'active' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'open' to 'closed' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from open to closed and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'closed' back to 'open' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'in progress' to 'completed' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from in progress to completed and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'completed' back to 'in progress' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify transition from 'completed' to 'archived' is allowed
expected_result: System transitions record from completed to archived and updates timestamp

scenario: Verify reverse transition from 'archived' back to 'completed' is handled
expected_result: System either allows reverse or rejects with clear error message

scenario: Verify skipping required intermediate states is rejected
expected_result: System rejects invalid state skip and shows required workflow path

scenario: Verify modifying a record in final/archived state is prevented
expected_result: System returns error when trying to modify finalised record

scenario: Verify service frontend validation matches backend validation
expected_result: Both frontend and backend reject same invalid inputs for service

scenario: Verify service API error messages match UI error displays
expected_result: Error messages are consistent between API response and UI rendering for service

scenario: Verify service API response data is correctly rendered in UI
expected_result: UI displays all fields from service API response accurately

scenario: Verify service behavior when service returns HTTP 500
expected_result: System shows user-friendly error and logs server error during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when service times out after 30s
expected_result: System shows timeout message and allows retry during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when service returns malformed JSON
expected_result: System handles parse error without crashing during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when database connection is lost
expected_result: System returns service-unavailable and queues retry during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when service returns HTTP 429 (rate limited)
expected_result: System backs off and retries after delay during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when DNS resolution fails
expected_result: System shows network error and suggests retry during service

scenario: Verify service behavior when SSL certificate is expired
expected_result: System rejects connection securely and alerts admin during service

scenario: Verify service performance with 100 concurrent users
expected_result: System handles load without degradation for service

scenario: Verify service performance with 1000 requests per second
expected_result: System rate-limits or throttles gracefully for service

scenario: Verify service performance with response within 2 seconds under normal load
expected_result: System meets response SLA for service

scenario: Verify service performance with with 10MB payload
expected_result: System processes or rejects large payloads correctly for service

scenario: Verify service performance with during peak database load
expected_result: System maintains data consistency and acceptable speed for service

scenario: Verify service performance with with cache miss on all requests
expected_result: System serves requests from DB without crashing for service

scenario: Verify service handles partial save due to mid-operation failure
expected_result: System rolls back partial data and maintains consistency for service

scenario: Verify service handles null value propagation through data pipeline
expected_result: System handles null safely without NullPointerException for service

scenario: Verify service handles character encoding mismatch (UTF-8 vs Latin-1)
expected_result: System preserves data integrity with correct encoding for service

scenario: Verify service handles concurrent write to same record
expected_result: System prevents data loss via locking or versioning for service

scenario: Verify service handles transaction fails after partial commit
expected_result: System rolls back entire transaction atomically for service

scenario: Verify service handles data truncation during insert
expected_result: System rejects or warns about data exceeding column width for service

scenario: Verify service: two users modify same record simultaneously
expected_result: System detects conflict and one update is rejected or merged during concurrent service

scenario: Verify service: read occurs during active write transaction
expected_result: System returns consistent data (no dirty reads) during concurrent service

scenario: Verify service: delete and update on same record at same time
expected_result: System one operation succeeds and the other gets conflict error during concurrent service

scenario: Verify service: rapid sequential requests from same user
expected_result: System processes in order without duplication during concurrent service

scenario: Verify service: optimistic locking violation
expected_result: System detects version mismatch and prompts user to refresh during concurrent service

scenario: Verify service when session expires mid-operation
expected_result: System saves progress or prompts re-authentication during service

scenario: Verify service when network connection drops during submission
expected_result: System queues or allows retry after reconnection during service

scenario: Verify service when browser is closed during multi-step form
expected_result: System preserves completed steps on return during service

scenario: Verify service when user navigates away before save
expected_result: System shows unsaved-changes warning dialog during service

scenario: Verify service when server restart during long-running operation
expected_result: System resumes or rolls back gracefully during service

scenario: Verify service when user double-clicks submit button
expected_result: System prevents duplicate submission during service
